title: senecio thapsoides subsp. thapsoides
intro: Senecio thapsoides subsp. thapsoides, also known as the rock ragwort, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Senecio thapsoides subsp. thapsoides include its ability to treat various conditions such as digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
